SIDES ENLARGER

Drop today's sides. Dialogue comes back bigger, and you can highlight each character's lines in their own color. Same pages, same everything else. Your script never leaves this device.

Want your size, mode and colors saved for next time? Add # and a unique name to the address and use that link from then on, like https://gothamsound.github.io/sides-enlarger/#peter123456.

Drop your sides PDF here

or click to choose a file

1.25×

    Highlight characters

    Tap a color to highlight that character's lines (cue, parentheticals and dialogue). Highlight some, all or none. Colors are remembered on this device for the run of the show.
